title: citrus × aurantium subf. jiyu
intro: Citrus × aurantium subf. jiyu, also known as sour orange or Seville orange, is a type of citrus plant that is a hybrid of the sour orange and the pomelo. The medicinal properties of Citrus × aurantium subf. jiyu lie in its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural antiseptic due to its high concentration of limonene and other compounds. The health benefits of consuming or using Citrus × aurantium subf. jiyu include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and aiding in weight loss, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Citrus × aurantium subf. jiyu can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and extracts, which are commonly used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
